canonical_definition: A non-verbal intelligence test, adapted as a visual reasoning benchmark (Zhang et al., 2019a), that requires identifying the missing element in a matrix of abstract patterns.
papers: GENOME: Generative Neuro-Symbolic Visual Reasoning by Growing and Reusing Modules
MMICL: Empowering Vision-language Model with Multi-Modal In-Context Learning

definitions.text: A non-verbal intelligence test, adapted as a visual reasoning benchmark (Zhang et al., 2019a), that requires identifying the missing element in a matrix of abstract patterns.
definitions.paper: GENOME: Generative Neuro-Symbolic Visual Reasoning by Growing and Reusing Modules

definitions.text: An IQ test-style benchmark used to evaluate the nonverbal and abstract reasoning ability of vision-language models by asking them to complete a visual pattern from a set of candidate images.
definitions.paper: MMICL: Empowering Vision-language Model with Multi-Modal In-Context Learning

characterization: A non-verbal intelligence test, adapted as a visual reasoning benchmark (Zhang et al., 2019a), that requires identifying the missing element in a matrix of abstract patterns.
